before:
def create(product)
  raise ArgumentError if product.nil?
  raise ArgumentError, 'name required' if product.name.blank?
  repo.add(product)
end

def update(product)
  raise ArgumentError if product.nil?
  raise ArgumentError, 'name required' if product.name.blank?
  repo.update(product)
end
after:
def create(product)
  validate_product!(product)
  repo.add(product)
end

def update(product)
  validate_product!(product)
  repo.update(product)
end

private

def validate_product!(product)
  raise ArgumentError if product.nil?
  raise ArgumentError, 'name required' if product.name.blank?
end
why_safe: Validation extracted into private helper; repository calls and exception types unchanged.
Identical mapping logic extracted into shared private helper; return values unchanged.
